_comment: n8n built-in MCP server — n8n's OWN MCP surface (Settings → MCP), distinct from the external `n8n-mcp` node-docs tool. Requires n8n running with MCP access enabled. Authenticated with a Bearer token of audience `mcp-server-api` (NOT a public-api key), carried in the Authorization header via ${N8N_MCP_SERVER_TOKEN} — keep it in a gitignored settings.local.json, NEVER commit it. Merge into .claude/settings.json or claude_desktop_config.json.
